Go for
Brendon.
Managing large-scale productions,
featuring clarity, coordination and control.

About me.

I’m a production leader working as a First Assistant Director on complex fast-paced film sets. I manage large crews, coordinate departments, and keep productions moving efficiently under pressure.

I bring a strong focus on clarity, coordination, and execution, with experience leading teams and timelines at scale. I’m focused on delivering results in high-pressure environments.

View My IMDb

Featured Projects

My Animal (2023)

First Assistant Director on Sundance-premiered feature film.

Violence (2025)

First Assistant Director on stylized action feature.

The Strangers: Chapter 3 (2026)

First Assistant Director on major studio horror franchise.

Morningside (2024)

Second Assistant Director on community-driven drama feature.

Wait for U (Future, Drake, Tems)

Assistant Director on major artist music video production.

Keep in touch

I’m always open to connecting about film production, new opportunities, or collaborative projects. If you're looking for someone to help lead and execute at a high level, feel free to reach out.

You can contact me directly or through the links below. I’m interested in conversations that involve strong teams, clear execution, and meaningful work.
